selections.name: Final Impact
selections.reason: With the top weights scratched, this veteran finds a very winnable race. He has won at this track previously and his recent 2nd here over 1400m two starts back reads well for this field. Drawn the rails to get the run of the race.

selections.name: Will To Excel
selections.reason: The class runner of the remaining field. While he carries 61.5kg, he drops into a very thin race after competing in deeper BM58s. His 4th at Mudgee last start was respectable.

selections.name: Testing The Cugat
selections.reason: Honest grinder who ran 4th in the wet at Albury last start. Will appreciate the firmer footing here and stays all day.

selections.name: Doppio
selections.reason: Light weight chance who gets in with 52kg after the claim. Needs to improve on recent form but the small field helps.

danger_horse.name: Will To Excel
danger_horse.reason: Has the back class to carry the weight and beat this depleted field.

selections.name: Zoysia
selections.reason: Massive class drop. Resuming here after running 5th at Canterbury (Metro) and 2nd at Canterbury last preparation. Even with the top weight, this horse's city form is superior to anything else in this country maiden. The one to beat.

selections.name: Allusive Intent
selections.reason: Consistent performer who has placed 3rd in his last two starts at this track. Has race fitness on his side and should be in the finish again.

selections.name: Claudio
selections.reason: Showed promise on debut when 3rd at Mudgee. Will be improved by that experience and looks the likely improver.

selections.name: Fortians
selections.reason: Ran a solid 4th at Mudgee last start and 3rd at Orange prior. Draws well and maps to get a soft run.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #1 (Best Bet of the day)

selections.name: Saint Philomena
selections.reason: Racing very consistently. Ran 2nd at this track and distance last start behind Zelestial. Draws perfectly in barrier 3 to sit on the speed and control the race.

selections.name: Proclivity
selections.reason: Coming off a strong 2nd at Tamworth in Class 1 company. The wide gate is a slight concern but has the speed to overcome it. In good form.

selections.name: Yorkel
selections.reason: Forgive the last run on a wet track. Won at this track/distance two starts back. Carries weight but loves this circuit.

selections.name: Just On Fire
selections.reason: Won a picnic race last start but was competitive in TAB grade prior (3rd at Dubbo). Drawn the rails.

danger_horse.name: Proclivity
danger_horse.reason: Recent form suggests he is ready to win if he can slot in from the wide gate.

selections.name: Magic Merlin
selections.reason: Progressive type from the Cavanough yard. Ran 2nd at Walcha and then a solid 4th at Tamworth. Looks ready to peak third-up and stepping up to the mile suits.

selections.name: Takethemoneyandrun
selections.reason: Knocking on the door with a 2nd at Beaumont and 3rd at Tamworth. Has to overcome a wide gate but has the form on the board.

selections.name: Real Housewives
selections.reason: Ran a good 2nd at this track over the mile last start. Proven at the trip and draws well.

selections.name: Recognition
selections.reason: Improved effort to run 3rd here over 1300m last start. Stepping up in trip looks positive.

danger_horse.name: Takethemoneyandrun
danger_horse.reason: If he gets cover from the wide draw, his recent form is good enough to win.

selections.name: Miss Maverick
selections.reason: Very consistent maiden performer. Placed 2nd at Tamworth and Orange in her last two starts. Draws well and deserves a win.

selections.name: Nightwalker
selections.reason: Ran 2nd at this track last start over 1300m. The wide barrier is the main negative, but with luck in running, will be right there.

selections.name: Narmer
selections.reason: Solid debut 4th at Orange. Will take natural improvement from that run and draws a soft gate.

selections.name: Highland Lad
selections.reason: Resuming for the Ponsonby stable. Has shown ability in previous preps and market watch is advised.

danger_horse.name: Nightwalker
danger_horse.reason: Proven at the track and trip, just needs to overcome the carpark draw.

selections.name: Inazuma Boy
selections.reason: In flying form. Won at this track two starts back and followed up with a win at Tamworth in Open company. Drawn perfectly to stalk the speed and strike.

selections.name: Chandon Star
selections.reason: Ran 2nd to Inazuma Boy last start at Tamworth. Meets him slightly better at the weights but has a tricky gate to navigate.

selections.name: Gidgee Guy
selections.reason: Last start winner at Mudgee. Steps up in grade but drops significantly in weight (52kg). Dangerous from the inside draw.

selections.name: How's It Kev
selections.reason: Class runner of the field. 5th in the Gilgandra Cup last prep. Resuming here but has the ability to sprint well fresh.

danger_horse.name: Chandon Star
danger_horse.reason: The main threat if the top pick falters.

selections.name: Nimble Star
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class from Highway Handicaps (Randwick/Wyong). His 3rd at Wyong two back is excellent form for this Country Class 4. Looks the winner.

selections.name: Crusader Kings
selections.reason: Ran 4th in the Country Championships Qualifier at Mudgee. That is superior form, but the barrier (15) is a major hurdle.

selections.name: Kranich
selections.reason: Consistent type who ran 3rd at Muswellbrook in BM82 grade. Well drawn and maps to get a lovely run.

selections.name: Andale
selections.reason: Resumed with a solid 3rd at Mudgee. Will strip fitter and draws to do no work.

danger_horse.name: Crusader Kings
danger_horse.reason: If he can slot in from the wide gate, his class will carry him a long way.

selections.name: La Potenza
selections.reason: Impressive maiden winner at this track last start. Looks to have above-average ability and can go on with it here despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Bounding Bon
selections.reason: Consistent sprinter who rarely runs a bad race. Placed 3rd here last start. Barrier 16 is horrible, but he has tactical speed.

selections.name: Bolo Miss
selections.reason: Speedy mare who ran 2nd here last start splitting Blue De Beers and Bounding Bon. Drawn better than her main rivals.

selections.name: Denman Bandit
selections.reason: Lightly raced improver who ran 4th in the same race as the selections above. Getting closer.

danger_horse.name: Bounding Bon
danger_horse.reason: Honest type who will be hitting the line hard if he finds cover.
